{'description': "In-process background service on each web server. Dequeues SmsLog items and sends to SMS gateway (GatewayAPI). Per-server queue — web server 1 CANNOT enqueue to web server 2's queue. Only time-sensitive messages are queued here (not bulk broadcast jobs which go via Azure Batch).", 'name': 'SmsBackgroundService', 'rules': ['Each web server has its own independent queue', 'Only enqueue time-sensitive messages (pin codes, single sends)', 'Bulk/scheduled broadcasts go via Azure Batch, not this service'], 'source': 'wiki:DEVELOPMENT/Background-services.md', 'type': 'IHostedService'}

{'description': 'At app startup, all recurring jobs registered in Quartz.NET with cron expressions. Each IJob invokes Azure Batch SDK or in-process background service.', 'name': 'QuartzSchedulerRegistration', 'trigger': 'Application startup.', 'data': ['Quartz.NET']}

{'description': 'Creates or updates a JobTask row. Resolves Job by name (ServiceAlertBatchAction). Appends JobTaskStatus row. Called by Azure Batch app and background services to report state.', 'name': 'LogJobTaskStatus', 'signature': 'LogJobTaskStatusAsync(jobName, statusCode, azureJobId, azureTaskId, parameters)', 'trigger': 'Batch job transitions: Queued, Running, Finished', 'data': ['Jobs', 'JobTasks', 'JobTaskStatuses']}

{'description': 'DESIGN RATIONALE: Pin code SMS and other time-sensitive messages need near-instant delivery. Azure Batch startup latency made it unsuitable (deduplication check caused delay: 100 pin requests → 1 delayed batch task). Background services eliminate that latency by sending directly from the web server.', 'name': 'WhyBackgroundServiceForMessages', 'source': 'wiki:DEVELOPMENT/Background-services.md', 'key_insight': 'Background services exist specifically because Azure Batch was too slow for pin codes and time-sensitive single sends.'}

{'description': 'In-process background service. Converts SmsLog items to EmailMessage records, then queues EmailMessages for SendGridBackgroundService.', 'name': 'EmailBackgroundService', 'source': 'wiki:DEVELOPMENT/Background-services.md', 'type': 'IHostedService'}

{'description': 'In-process background service. Dequeues voice messages and sends to voice gateway (Infobip). Same per-server queue isolation as SmsBackgroundService.', 'name': 'VoiceBackgroundService', 'source': 'wiki:DEVELOPMENT/Background-services.md', 'type': 'IHostedService'}

{'description': 'Returns recent JobTask rows with status history for admin monitoring UI.', 'name': 'GetRecentAndOngoingTasks', 'signature': 'GetRecentAndOngoingTasksAsync() → IReadOnlyCollection<JobTaskDto>', 'trigger': 'Admin polling or SSE stream refresh.', 'data': ['Jobs', 'JobTasks', 'JobTaskStatuses']}

{'description': 'Sends queued EmailMessages to SendGrid gateway. Split from EmailBackgroundService so non-SmsLog emails (e.g. password reset, welcome emails) can also be queued directly as EmailMessages without needing a SmsLogId.', 'name': 'SendGridBackgroundService', 'rules': ['EmailMessages can be queued without SmsLogId to support system emails (password reset, account notifications)'], 'source': 'wiki:DEVELOPMENT/Background-services.md', 'type': 'IHostedService'}

{'description': 'When job task status changes, fires JobTaskStatusChangedEvent → SSE push to connected admin clients.', 'name': 'ActiveJobsClientEventPush', 'trigger': 'JobTaskStatusChangedEvent raised by LogJobTaskStatusAsync.', 'data': ['JobTasks', 'ClientEvents']}

{'integrations': ['Lib.AspNetCore.ServerSentEvents NuGet package', 'IEventSourceSubscriber — implemented per module to subscribe clients to relevant groups'], 'source': 'wiki:ServiceAlert/Domain-Description/Server-Sent-Event-Stream.md', 'name': 'ClientEventBackgroundService', 'type': 'IHostedService', 'entities': ['ClientEvents(Id, Key, DateCreatedUtc, Payload)'], 'description': 'Polls ClientEvents table for new events (by tracking last-seen Id per server). Sends each event to the matching subscription group via Lib.AspNetCore.ServerSentEvents. Used to push real-time updates to browser (e.g. lookup status, unread conversation count, CitizenDialogue search results).'}
